title: .env status and proposal workflow
goal: Expose effective environment settings safely and generate operator-reviewed .env proposals.
acceptance: Env descriptors mark each value as read-only, proposal-only or local-file editable.
Production default apply mode is proposal, not direct .env mutation.
Effective values are masked according to sensitivity policy.
Generated proposals are stored under runtime data, not repository root.
UI marks restart-required settings and provides an operator checklist.
.env.example is updated only for implemented, documented keys.
Tests cover masking, proposal generation and production write restrictions.
